mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_records (record_id, account_id, target_word, start_doc, nav_path, status, last_article, played_at) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{accountId}, #{targetWord}, #{startDoc}, #{navPath}, 'in_progress', #{lastArticle}, #{playedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_records WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 'in_progress' ORDER BY played_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM game_records WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status IN ('cleared', 'abandoned') ORDER BY played_at DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update: UPDATE game_records SET status = 'abandoned', last_article = NULL WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 'in_progress' AND played_at < NOW() - (#{thresholdMinutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL
